items.claim: Conor McGregor is mentally focused and understands the significance of this fight.
items.quote: he's got it dialed in. He I think he understands the meaning of this fight that way.

items.claim: Max Holloway is not capable of competing with top 15 fighters at 170 pounds.
items.quote: he's not going to be able to compete with the 170ers who are, you know, at the top like even in the top 15 of that division

items.claim: Max Holloway's fighting style relies on waiting for openings and then scoring a huge win.
items.quote: Max's ability to just kind of wait, wait, wait, go, and then score a huge win. Um, it's sort of his calling card to a degree.

items.claim: Max Holloway is a 'jackhammer in slow motion' who constantly chips away at opponents.
items.quote: Max has been Max is Max is a jackhammer in slow motion. like he's just constantly chipping, constantly chi
